theme: key-value shard rebalancing under a bounded migration budget
title: Hot-Key Repair: Bounded Migration under Power-of-Two Choices
innovation_hook: Diagnose the heavy tail first and spend the scarce migration budget only on the hottest keys via power-of-two-choices, leaving the light majority in place.
strategies: do-nothing baseline: keep every key on shard0[i] (reproduces the evaluator's do-nothing reference, exactly 0.1)

id-order power-of-two pass (the trap): scan keys in creation-id order, moving each to the less-loaded of its two alternative shards if that beats its current shard's running load, until the budget is spent; ignores weight entirely, so on skewed instances it exhausts the budget on ordinary early keys and never reaches the viral tail at the end of the id list

weight-diagnosed power-of-two pass (the insight): sort keys by weight descending so the scarce budget is spent on the handful of heavy keys first, routing each to the lighter of its two precomputed alternatives against a running load state (so later heavy keys see earlier moves and don't pile onto the same relief shard), leaving the light majority untouched
multi-hotspot-aware planner: additionally reasons jointly across two independent hotspots and any residual budget on next-heaviest keys to further shave the max load
